field.name: HashingCycleMarker
field.summary: Marker used when a cycle is encountered during graph serialization.

field.name: HashingNullMarker
field.summary: Marker used when a null value is encountered during graph serialization.

field.name: HashingReferenceMarker
field.summary: Marker used when an already-completed object reference is encountered again during graph serialization.

method.name: GenerateDeterministicHashCode
method.summary: Generate a deterministic hash code for an object graph.

method.name: GenerateDeterministicHashCodeAsync
method.summary: Generate a deterministic hash code for an object graph.

method.name: IsUnorderedCollection
method.summary: Determine whether a type represents an unordered collection for hashing purposes.
method.returns: True when enumeration order should be normalized before hashing.

method.name: IsUnorderedDictionary
method.summary: Determine whether a type represents an unordered dictionary for hashing purposes.
method.returns: True when entry order should be normalized before hashing.

method.name: CreateCycleBytes
method.summary: Create the serialized marker bytes for an in-progress object reference.

method.name: CreateReferenceBytes
method.summary: Create the serialized marker bytes for a completed object reference.

method.name: GenerateDeterministicHashCodeCore
method.summary: Generate a deterministic graph-identity hash code using a shared serialization pipeline.

method.name: GetDeterministicBytesCore
method.summary: Serialize an object graph into deterministic bytes while preserving graph identity.
method.returns: Deterministic serialized bytes for the current node.

method.name: GetDictionaryBytes
method.summary: Serialize a dictionary into deterministic bytes with normalized entry ordering.
method.returns: Deterministic serialized bytes for the dictionary.

method.name: GetArrayBytes
method.summary: Serialize an array into deterministic bytes.
method.returns: Deterministic serialized bytes for the array.

method.name: GetEnumerableBytes
method.summary: Serialize an enumerable into deterministic bytes.
method.returns: Deterministic serialized bytes for the enumerable.

method.name: GetObjectBytes
method.summary: Serialize a reflected object into deterministic bytes.
method.returns: Deterministic serialized bytes for the object.

method.name: GetSortKeyBytes
method.summary: Serialize a value into deterministic bytes for sorting in unordered hashing scenarios.

method.name: GetSortKeyBytesPair
method.summary: Create deterministic sort key bytes for a dictionary entry.
method.returns: Deterministic sort key bytes for the entry.
